productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Classy Black Sandals
description: The perfect way to complement your ethno-western wear is to slip into these simple and classy sandals from carlton london. The elasticated midfoot and ankle straps make this a great everyday wear. Heel: 3" Upper Synthetic leather straps on the forefoot with twill fabric upper Elasticated midfoot and ankle straps to offer a customised Fit Synthetic leather footbed with a foot patch Outsole TPR outsole with horizontal grooves on the forefoot for grip Raised heel in stainless steel with a rubber patch Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
